ingredients.alim_nom_eng: Salt, white (sea, igneous or rock), iodine added, no fluride added

ingredients_text: _Torsk_ 56%, panering 44% (_vetemjöl_, vatten, rapsolja, salt, potatisstärkelse, druvsocker, solrosolja, socker, vitpeppar, svartpeppar, citronjuice, lökpulver, antioxidationsmedel (citronsyra)).
product_name: Porzioni di filetto di merluzzo nordico
